creator: nagy.attila@gmail.com
text:
OK, but please don't forget to bump dovecot2-pigeonhole's portrevision.

Thanks,

On 05/30/12 22:26, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/dovecot2,
>
> Please note that PR ports/168476 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/168476
>
